title: github jcob-bd/notebooklm-mcp-cliを調べて、kernel/FUGUEに活用できるか検証せよ。/kernelで。
summary_text: Kernel orchestration is active for this session. Bootstrap target: 6+ lanes (minimum 6). Active models: Codex, GLM, Gemini, Copilot. Lane manifest: - `block-conditions`: critic - GLM lane returned reinjection block conditions - `artifact-metadata`: reviewer - Gemini lane returned artifact receipt metadata constraints - `retrieval-policy`: reviewer - Gemini lane returned retrieval-only handling rules - `inline-limits`: reviewer - GLM lane returned inline inclusion limits - `lazy-fetch`: reviewer - Gemini lane returned lazy-fetch rules - `receipt-fields`: reviewer - GLM lane returned bounded evidence receipt fields `fallback_used: true` `missing_lane: Claude` `fallback_provider: copilot-cli` `fallback_reason: claude availability probe exited with signal SIGTERM after 15s timeout in this run` 続行方針は固定です。`NotebookLM` は `one-shot CLI+skill adapter` にし、Kernel/FUGUE へは全文ではなく `bounded evidence envelope` だけ返します。 - inline summary は `<=500 tokens` - 返却 packet は `<=4KB` - major artifact は 1 run あたり `<=3` - 必須参照は `notebook_id`, `artifact_id`, `raw_output_path`, `schema_version`, `is_truncated` - 長文本文・transcript・tool catalog は prompt に再注入しない - 詳細取得は `lazy fetch` のみで、権限再検証つき - TTL で artifact cache を掃除し、Notebook は短命にする - cap 超過、stable reference 不在、state authority 化の試みは `BLOCK` このままの Kernel ルールで進めるなら、次の実装単位は `nlm-visual-brief` と `nlm-slide-prep` の contract 定義です。
